goal: Allow workspace admins to invite a teammate by email and track pending invites from the members page.

in: Workspace admins can send a single invite from the members page.
Pending invites are visible in the members list.
Duplicate pending invites for the same email are blocked with clear feedback.
out: Editing a teammate role after the invite is accepted.
Changes to the downstream invite acceptance experience.

constraints: Reuse the existing email delivery service.
Do not require a new admin permission model.
Keep the flow compatible with the current members page layout.
acceptance_criteria: Submitting a valid new email from the members page creates exactly one pending invite and queues exactly one invite email.
After a successful invite, the members page shows the invited email with a pending status without requiring a page reload.
Submitting an email that already has a pending invite does not create another invite and returns actionable feedback.
assumptions: The invite acceptance link infrastructure is already available.
